The xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC
summary: A binary distribution of GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC.

title: The xPack Windows Build Tools
summary: A Windows binary distribution of GNU Make, to be used with Eclipse Embedded CDT.

title: The xPack Ninja Build
summary: A binary distribution of Ninja Build.

title: The xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC
summary: A binary distribution of GNU Arm Embedded GCC.

title: The xPack CMake
summary: A binary distribution of CMake.

title: The xPack Meson Build
summary: A binary distribution of Meson Build.

title: The xPack QEMU Arm
summary: A binary distribution of QEMU Arm.

title: The xPack OpenOCD
summary: A binary distribution of OpenOCD.

title: The xPack Build Runner
summary: A light and fast tool to build generic projects, inspired by Ninja Build but with the configuration files in JSON (in design phase).

title: The xPack Build Generator
summary: An advanced tool to build complex projects, inspired by CMake, but with the configuration files in JSON and actions in JavaScript (in design phase).

title: The xPack Build Configurator
summary: A tool to manage project configurations, inspired by eCos CDL, but with the configuration files in JSON (in design phase).

title: The xPack Basic Project Builder
summary: A tool to build day to day projects without having to manually write make files, with an emphasis on C/C++ and embedded applications, inspired by Eclipse CDT managed builder (work in progress).

title: The xPack Package Manager
summary: A tool to manage dependencies for generic multi-version source and binary packages, inspired by npm.

title: Maintainer info
summary: Resources for the xPack projects maintainers.

title: xPack Developer info
summary: Resources for xPack developers.

title: The xPack Build Box
summary: An elaborated environment for building binary xPacks.

title: The xPack Project
keywords: packages, code sharing, reusing, libraries, applications, c/c++, embedded
summary: Tools to manage, configure and build complex, package based, multi-target projects.

xPack OpenOCD v0.10.0-15 released
summary: Version 0.10.0-15 is a maintenance release; it updates to the latest upstream master.

title: xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC v8.3.0-2.2 released
summary: Version 8.3.0-2.2 is a maintenance release of the xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC, to fix a regression bug in binutils 2.32 affecting the parsing of LENGTH and ORIGIN in linker scripts.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v9.3.1-1.3 released
summary: Version 9.3.1-1.3 is a maintenance release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC, created with the updated, more robust, new build scripts.

title: xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC v8.3.0-2.1 released
summary: Version 8.3.0-2.1 is a new release of the xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC, following SiFive release 2020.04.0 from August 2020; it also changes to use DT_RPATH to make the binaries immune to custom LD_LIBRARY_PATH.

title: xPack Meson Build v0.55.3-1 released
summary: Version 0.55.3-1 is the first release of the xPack Meson Build package.

title: xPack CMake v3.18.3-1 released
summary: Version 3.18.3-1 is the first release of the xPack CMake package.

title: xPack Ninja Build v1.10.1-1 released
summary: Version 1.10.1-1 is a new release of the xPack Ninja Build package.

title: xPack Ninja Build v1.10.0-1 released
summary: Version 1.10.0-1 is the first release of the xPack Ninja Build package.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v9.3.1-1.2 released
summary: Version 9.3.1-1.2 is a maintenance release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC, intended to fix C++ exceptions support for non-nano libraries, and to use DT_RPATH to make the binaries immune to custom LD_LIBRARY_PATH.

title: xPack Windows Build Tools v2.12.2 released
summary: Version 2.12.2 is a maintenance release; it repacks the same tools from the previous release, but built with the new XBB v3.2 tools.

title: xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC v8.3.0-1.2 released
summary: Version 8.3.0-1.2 is a maintenance release of the xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC, that packs the SiFive release from August 2019, and adds support for running on Arm platforms, like Raspberry Pi.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v9.3.1-1.1 released
summary: Version 9.3.1-1.1 is a new release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC, following Arm release from June 01, 2020 (version 9-2020-q2-update). This is also the first release that adds support for running on Arm platforms, like Raspberry Pi.

title: xPack QEMU Arm v2.8.0-9 released
summary: Version 2.8.0-9 is a maintenance release; it adds support for running on Arm platforms, like Raspberry Pi.

title: xPack OpenOCD v0.10.0-14 released
summary: Version 0.10.0-14 is a maintenance release; it updates to the latest upstream master and adds support for running on Arm platforms, like Raspberry Pi.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v9.2.1-1.1 released
summary: Version 9.2.1-1.1 is a new release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC, following Arm release from November 06, 2019 (version 9-2019-q4-major).

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v8.3.1-1.4 released
summary: Version 8.3.1-1.4 is a maintenance release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC repacking the files from the previous 8.3.1-1.3 release in archives with a simpler structure and more standard names.

title: xPack QEMU Arm v2.8.0-8 released
summary: Version 2.8.0-8 is a maintenance release, to fix a bug affecting STM32F1 GPIOs.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v8.3.1-1.3 released
summary: Version 8.3.1-1.3 is a maintenance release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC to partly fix the build for GDB with Python support.

title: xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC v8.3.0-1.1 released
summary: Version 8.3.0-1.1 is a new release of the xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC, following SiFive release from August 2019.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v8.3.1-1.2 released
summary: Version 8.3.1-1.2 is a maintenance release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC to fix the libgcov build bug.

title: xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC v8.2.0-3.1 released
summary: Version 8.2.0-3.1 is a new release of the xPack GNU RISC-V Embedded GCC, following SiFive release from May 2019.

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v8.3.1-1.1 released
summary: Version 8.3.1-1.1 is a new release of xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC, following Arm release from July 10, 2019 (version 8-2019-q3-update).

title: xPack GNU Arm Embedded GCC v7.3.1-1.2 released
summary: Version 7.3.1-1.2 is a repack of the GNU MCU Eclipse Arm Embedded GCC v7.3.1-1.1 using the new build scripts.

title: xPack QEMU Arm v2.8.0-7 released
summary: Version 2.8.0-7 is a maintenance release, to fix a bug affecting Windows.

title: The xPack project web has a new look!
xPack OpenOCD v0.10.0-13 released
summary: Version 0.10.0-13 is a maintenance release; it updates to the latest upstream master.
